title: Modular Machinery Reborn Create
description: The mod includes Kinetic input/output hatches for MMR
body:
This mod requires Create and Modular Machinery Reborn to be installed to be operational

 

The mod includes  tiered, configurable tiers of  kinetic input/output hatches to allow for the creation of big multiblock powered by kinetic from Create machinery like Gregtech's Implosion Compressor, Vacuum Freezer, ... and whatever you might imagine.

 

This mod has an integration with the Modular Machinery Reborn recipe system in json and KubeJS.

You can see the [Test KubeJS server script](https://github.com/marcin212/MMR-Create/blob/master/README.md) for example machine and recipe using kubejs
